name: John Smith
text: Excellent work on our roof replacement. The team was professional, clean, and finished on time. Highly recommend!

name: Sarah Johnson
text: Fast response to our emergency leak situation. They tarped our roof the same day and completed repairs quickly.

name: Mike Davis
text: Great gutter installation. Quality work and fair pricing. Would use again for future roofing needs.

name: Emily Chen
text: Outstanding service from start to finish. The crew was respectful of our property and the new roof looks amazing. Best decision we made!

name: Robert Wilson
text: After the storm damage, LightHouse Roofing was there within hours. Professional, efficient, and they handled the insurance paperwork perfectly.

name: Lisa Martinez
text: Very satisfied with the roof repair. The team explained everything clearly and cleaned up thoroughly. Only minor delay due to weather.
